html:
Troubleshooting

Status: Active Audience: All users. Purpose: Fix the most common failures quickly.

Start here

  • desktop-smoke-tests.md — maintainers' checklist before shipping a desktop build.
  • common-issues.md — quick fixes for the most frequent CLI, config, export, and desktop failures.

If you want to…

  • Debug import or transform errors — a dedicated page is on its way, see common-issues.md.
  • Understand why the desktop app refuses to start — see common-issues.md first, then the desktop smoke tests.

Structure

Active reference

  • desktop-smoke-tests.md
  • common-issues.md
